title: Burglary at Rathinapuri: 10 Sovereigns of Gold Stolen
summary: Unknown thieves broke into a residential property and stole 10 sovereigns of gold and cash. Police investigating the high-profile burglary case.

title: Five Convicted for Job Fraud: 14 Years Imprisonment
summary: Five perpetrators sentenced to 14 years rigorous imprisonment for cheating job seekers with fake foreign employment offers across multiple states.

title: Bengaluru Dacoity Link: Six Coimbatore Residents Arrested
summary: Six residents arrested for involvement in a Bengaluru robbery. Police seized bikes, phones, and laptops worth ₹3 lakh from the accused.

title: State-Level Junior Hockey Tournament Kicks Off Tomorrow
summary: U-19 junior hockey championship beginning in Coimbatore and Udumalpet with 700 players from 35 teams competing for state honors.

title: Indian Women's Badminton Team Beats Ukraine at Uber Cup
summary: Indian women's team secures a crucial victory against Ukraine to remain in the Uber Cup tournament with strong playoff chances.

title: L&T Enters B2B Electronics Market with New Coimbatore Facility
summary: Larsen & Toubro opens new facility in Coimbatore to tap growing B2B electronics market. Expected to create 500+ jobs in region.

title: Actor Dhanush Draws Massive Crowds for Film 'Kara' Promotion
summary: Superstar Dhanush visited Coimbatore to promote his latest film 'Kara', attracting thousands of fans and media attention.

title: TNSTC Operates 70 Extra Buses to Chennai Post-Poll
summary: TNSTC added 70 special buses from Coimbatore to Chennai and 898 buses to other destinations to handle post-election travel surge.

title: IMD Issues Heavy Rainfall Warning from May 1
summary: India Meteorological Department warns of heavy rainfall expected from Friday (May 1) for at least three days, bringing relief from heatwave.

title: BJP's Annamalai Predicts DMK Defeat in Coimbatore
summary: BJP leader K. Annamalai claimed DMK will face defeat in Coimbatore and criticised state minister Senthilbalaji's schemes.
